Petition For Order Determining That Real Property Is An Asset Of Decedents Probate Estate With Deed Attached
Off Calendar Aug-17-2018 Advanced From Oct-24-18 To Sep-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining That Real Property Is An Asset Of Decedents Probate Estate With Deed Attached
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Duane Leonard for and with Denise Harrison (Petitioner/Executor).

Ms. Harrison stated that her best guess is that the Trust was created in 1997, that the only reason she found out about it is because the property is in escrow, that the individual that created the Trust was prosecuted by the Attorney General for abuse and fraud of the elderly, and selling poorly funded annuities, and that she thinks her Aunt may have realized that something was not right with the Trust and therefore did not provide her with a copy. Ms. Harrison also stated that she helped her Aunt with her finances, that her Aunt provided her with copies of everything else and that there is some urgency because escrow is only extended to September 28th. The Petition for Order Determining that Real Property is an Asset of Decedent's Estate is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Off Calendar
Ex Parte Application For Special Setting Of Hearing On Petition For Order Determining That Real Property Is An Asset Of Decedents Probate Estate

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Denise Harrison in propria persona

The Court made inquiries regarding Ms. Harrison's knowledge of Probate procedures and emphasized the need for an attorney to ensure proper handlings of the estate are done correctly. Ms. Harrison stated that she has assistance from an attorney who is billing her hourly, and that she didn't want to be on the hook for attorney fees. The Court granted The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed (subject to review of the order). The Court will consider whether to grant with Full or Limited authority under IAEA. Bond in the amount of $700,000.00 is required. A Status on Filing of Inventory and Appraisal is set for September 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A Status on filing a Petition for Final Distribution is set for November 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
